Name: Brillantmont International School
Tagline: Brillantmont International School is a family owned day and boarding school for boys and girls aged 13-18 in the centre of Lausanne, Switzerland, with nearly 150 years of history.
About: We look forward to meeting you in person worldwide to talk about Brillantmont and how to join our school here in Switzerland. To arrange your individual appointment, please email at externalrelations@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Marta Gallotti our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly discover@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch If you cannot come to meet us then let's set up a video call discussion with Sarah Frei, our Head of Admissions, who can guide you in your journey to become part of our BM family.
Philosophy: Brillantmont has an incredible location, with the best of both worlds - in the city centre yet within 1 hour of the ski slopes. This means we have fantastic opportunities for learning and leisure.
Outcomes: Brillantmont International School boasts a strong record of students gaining admission to prestigious universities worldwide, including the UK, USA, and Switzerland. Alumni frequently excel in diverse fields, reflecting the school's commitment to holistic education and personal development.
Admissions: To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Marta Gallotti our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly discover@brillantmont.ch To arrange your individual appointment with Albane Roca our Admissions Representative, please contact her directly connect@brillantmont.ch If you cannot come to meet us then let's set up a video call discussion with Sarah Frei, our Head of Admissions, who can guide you in your journey to become part of our BM family.
Quote: Empowering lifelong learners to thrive globally through personalized education and a nurturing international community.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: These are organised by gender and are varied, so students get to try many different sports, either outdoors or in our amazing full-sized gymnasium. A wide range is offered including tennis, basketball, Zumba, gymnastics, trampoline, volleyball, badminton and many more.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Brillantmont International School's faculty includes experienced educators from diverse international backgrounds, many holding advanced degrees and certifications in their fields. Teachers specialize in the British curriculum, ensuring high-quality, globally recognized education.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The school offers comprehensive pastoral care, with dedicated house parents and counsellors supporting students' mental and emotional wellbeing. Boarding life is enriched with a nurturing environment, fostering a sense of community and belonging.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students at Brillantmont engage in a rigorous British curriculum, preparing for IGCSEs and A-Levels, with personalized learning approaches. The curriculum emphasizes critical thinking and adaptability, essential for success in a global context.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from Brillantmont consistently gain admission to top universities worldwide, including Oxford, Harvard, and ETH Zurich. The school's emphasis on holistic education ensures students excel in diverse fields post-graduation.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Brillantmont maintains high academic standards through regular progress reports and parent-teacher meetings. An advisory system supports individual student growth, ensuring alignment with the school's IB accreditation and educational goals.
